name: voxi-converge-scope
description: Isolated converge scope: stands up ONE real Expo screen (app/app/reveal.tsx) under react-native-web in Playwright, behind the SAME testIDs, talking to the real BFF. Deliberately NOT a workspace member (it would inherit app/'s unresolvable Expo-pinned ranges); it owns its own node_modules so `bun add react-native-web react-dom react` works in scope per the task brief.
